mainEntity.name: Steps to file occupational illness claim in Taylorsville online?
mainEntity.text: Steps to file occupational illness claim in Taylorsville online?

acceptedAnswer.text: File Taylorsville claims via Utah Labor Commission portal: submit Form 100, medicals, exposure history.[5]

suggestedAnswer.text: Online system requires employer info, diagnosis. Fast-track undisputed. Holladay help available.[5]
